goal: Supabase/Postgres-backed multi-organization Orun SaaS control plane
notes: Task 0083 Implementer complete on PR #125 successor branch impl/task-0083-domain-cutover, PR #129, head 28da48896cc3278cceae50dc83d28db676d0c0fa. CI run 26631953781 in flight at orchestration time: 16 pass / 17 pending, 0 failure.

Scope: swing stage.sourceplane.ai and prod.sourceplane.ai from cloudflare_pages_domain.console (on legacy sourceplane-web-console-{stage,prod} Pages projects) to cloudflare_workers_domain.console (on sourceplane-web-console-next-{stage,prod} Workers + Static Assets, the cloudflare-workers-assets-turbo composition shipped in PRs #126/#127/#128). Delete apps/web-console/. Remove the *.pages.dev console origins from api-edge CORS. Spec sweep for the new deployment shape.

Implementer deviation from prompt: used v4 resource name cloudflare_workers_domain instead of v5 cloudflare_workers_custom_domain to keep blast radius small; provider pinned to ~> 4.52 (was ~> 4.30). Resource keeps environment = "production" (only valid value). pagesProjectPrefix variable + pages_project_name output kept read-only for one soak cycle.

Task 0083 Verifier scoped at ai/tasks/task-0083-verifier.md. Verifier must: (1) confirm PR-boundary match, (2) drive PR CI to 33/33 SUCCESS, (3) merge, (4) run mandatory post-merge soak (Terraform apply logs + curl on both apex domains + CORS preflight + workers.dev rollback hatch alive) per orun-saas-orchestration references/post-merge-deploy-profile-gap.md. Two implementer-flagged follow-ups: drop pagesProjectPrefix after soak; optional v5 cloudflare provider bump.

Rollback hatch: legacy Pages projects sourceplane-web-console-{stage,prod} are not deleted in this PR and remain on Cloudflare, so reverting the merge re-attaches cloudflare_pages_domain.console on the next apply.
